name: viewkit
description: Guided skills for building terminal UIs with the viewkit Go toolkit.

interface.shortDescription: Guidance for building Go terminal UIs with viewkit
interface.longDescription: Task-focused skills for using the viewkit Go toolkit to build terminal UI layouts, charts, themes, forms, keymaps, notifications, and tests.
defaultPrompt: Use viewkit to add a new pane to this TUI screen.
Use viewkit to wire a keymap and footer hints for this screen.
Use viewkit to add charts and tests for this terminal UI.
